name: code-snippet
title: CodeSnippet
description: Renders a code block with an optional copy-to-clipboard button. Three modes:

meta.docs:
# CodeSnippet

Renders a code block with an optional copy-to-clipboard button. Three modes:

- **inline** â€” renders an `<code>` chip suitable for in-prose use; the whole element is the copy target.
- **single** â€” single-line code block; truncates and shows a copy button in the corner.
- **multi** â€” multi-line code block; long content can be expanded/collapsed past `maxCollapsedNumberOfRows`.

## When to use

- **Display API examples, install commands, configuration snippets**.
- **Anything where users typically need to copy the text** â€” the copy button is the differentiator vs. a plain `<pre><code>`.

## When not to use

- **Heavy syntax highlighting** â€” pair with a syntax-highlighter library (Shiki, Prism, etc.) inside the `children` slot.
- **Diffs / multi-file viewers** â€” use a dedicated diff component.

## Composition

- `children` is rendered as the visual content; `copyText` overrides what's actually copied (defaults to extracted inner text).
- `feedback` and `feedbackTimeout` control the post-copy aria-live announcement.
- `wrapText` enables soft-wrap inside the multi-line block.
- `maxCollapsedNumberOfRows` (default `15`) controls when the show-more toggle appears.
- The copy uses `navigator.clipboard.writeText`. If unavailable (older browsers / non-HTTPS dev contexts), the call fails silently â€” pass `hideCopyButton` to prevent confusion.
meta.migrationGuide:
# CodeSnippet â€” Carbon â†’ shadcn migration guide

Carbon ships a `CodeSnippet` with three modes (inline / single / multi), an integrated copy button, configurable feedback, and an expand/collapse toggle for long content. shadcn ships nothing equivalent â€” this wrapper recreates the surface in plain HTML + Tailwind on top of the local `Button` primitive.

## Mapping

| Carbon prop | shadcn prop | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `type` | `type` | `'inline'` / `'single'` / `'multi'`. |
| `copyText` | `copyText` | Overrides the copied string. Defaults to extracted inner text. |
| `hideCopyButton` | `hideCopyButton` | Disables the button (and inline copy-on-click). |
| `disabled` | `disabled` | Visually disabled + non-interactive. |
| `feedback` | `feedback` | Announced via `aria-live="polite"` after copy. |
| `feedbackTimeout` | `feedbackTimeout` | Milliseconds before the feedback message resets. Default `2000`. |
| `copyButtonDescription` | `copyButtonDescription` | a11y label for the copy button. |
| `wrapText` | `wrapText` | Soft-wrap inside the multi-line block. |
| `maxCollapsedNumberOfRows` | `maxCollapsedNumberOfRows` | Lines visible when collapsed. Default `15`. |
| `showMoreText` / `showLessText` | `showMoreText` / `showLessText` | Toggle labels. |
| `onClick` | `onClick` | Fires on copy-button click. |

## Carbon features missing in shadcn

- **`align`, `autoAlign`** â€” Carbon's tooltip-on-the-button alignment props. shadcn uses an `aria-label` instead of a Tooltip; if you need Tooltip parity, wrap the Button externally.
- **`light` variant** â€” deprecated upstream; use `Layer` instead.
- **`min/maxExpanded/CollapsedNumberOfRows`** â€” Carbon's full row-count control matrix. shadcn ships only `maxCollapsedNumberOfRows`; expanded view shows everything.
- **Carbon's exact monospace stack and IBM Plex Mono fonts** â€” shadcn relies on Tailwind's `font-mono` (system stack).
- **`feedback` Tooltip** â€” Carbon shows a tooltip with the feedback string; shadcn uses an icon swap (`Copy` â†’ `Check`) plus an `sr-only aria-live` announcement.

## shadcn features missing in Carbon

- **None of consequence** â€” shadcn is intentionally a smaller surface.

## Behavioural differences

- **Clipboard fallback** â€” `navigator.clipboard.writeText` is required. In insecure contexts (HTTP) it throws; the wrapper catches and silently noops. If you need a `document.execCommand('copy')` fallback, add it inside `useClipboard`.
- **Inline copy target** â€” Carbon: clicking anywhere on the inline snippet copies. shadcn matches.
- **Expanded state** â€” Carbon: animates height on toggle. shadcn: instant.

## Migration checklist

1. Swap the import.
2. Drop `align`/`autoAlign` if you used them â€” wrap with a `<Tooltip>` externally if needed.
3. If you used `min/maxExpandedNumberOfRows`, drop them; expanded view shows everything.
4. If you have non-string children (icons, syntax highlighting), pass `copyText` explicitly so clipboard text is correct.
5. Drop `@use '@carbon/styles/scss/components/code-snippet'` imports.
